title: euonymus europaeus f. scaberulus
intro: Euonymus europaeus f. scaberulus, also known as the Spiny Euonymus or European Spindle, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Euonymus europaeus f. scaberulus include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Euonymus europaeus f. scaberulus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and has also been used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues and as a laxative.
